messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-494 — One-time reconcile tool to CLOSE the legacy per-ticket Telegram topics (closeForumTopic), honoring a 429's retry_after; never touch epic/Backlog/standing topics; idempotent on re-run
What it solves: MIGRATION SLICE of the BL-491 epic (human decision D2 = one-time CLOSE). depends_on BL-493 — only
close the legacy per-ticket topics once the new epic/Backlog routing is live, so nothing is still
writing to a topic being closed.
First acceptance signal: Running the tool closes each legacy per-ticket topic
Approval context: Migration slice implementing your decision D2 (one-time CLOSE of the legacy per-ticket topics — read-only, history preserved, never deleted). FIRM: close (not delete), 429-safe via the backfill tool's retry_after, per-ticket topics only (never epic/Backlog/standing), idempotent re-run. OPEN for you…
BL-494 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-494" (or "reject BL-494 <reason>") to act.
